name: Monstera Deliciosa
description: Known as the Swiss Cheese Plant, this statement foliage piece adds an instant gorgeous tropical vibe.

reviews.comment: Best decorative plant in my current collection.

name: Snake Plant
description: The Snake Plant is an ideal choice for beginners. It is incredibly hardy and purifies bedroom oxygen.

reviews.comment: Excellent plant! Delivered in very healthy condition.
Looks wonderful on my office desk.

name: Pothos (Money Plant)
description: A beautiful trailing plant that grows fast and survives in almost any lighting condition.

reviews.comment: Incredible growth in just two weeks!

name: Calathea Orbifolia
description: Features beautiful oversized leaves with distinct geometric stripes. Loves moisture.

reviews.comment: Beautiful stripes, but needs high humidity to stay perfect.

name: Peace Lily
description: Produces elegant white blooms and is top-tier for removing airborne toxins.

reviews.comment: Flowered within a week! Love it.

name: Fiddle Leaf Fig
description: An iconic indoor tree with large, heavily veined leaves.

name: ZZ Plant
description: Thrives on neglect. Perfect for low light and forgetful waterers.

name: Aloe Vera
description: A succulent species famous for its soothing medicinal gel.

name: Boston Fern
description: Lush green fronds that look amazing in hanging baskets.

name: Spider Plant
description: Easy to grow, produces tiny plantlets that hang down like spiders.

name: Lavender
description: Beautiful purple flowers with a calming, aromatic scent.

name: English Ivy
description: An evergreen climbing vine that effectively clears air impurities.

name: Cast Iron Plant
description: Virtually indestructible. Survives in dark corners with little water.

name: Rubber Plant
description: Features striking, glossy burgundy-tinted large oval leaves.

name: Bird of Paradise
description: A large dramatic plant with unique banana-like leaves.

name: Chinese Evergreen
description: Patterned silver-green leaves that tolerate dry indoor air perfectly.

name: Areca Palm
description: A beautiful feathery palm that acts as a natural indoor humidifier.

name: Jade Plant
description: A popular good-luck succulent with thick, woody stems.

name: Red Robin Bonsai
description: An expertly pruned miniature tree with vibrant red spring leaves.

name: String of Pearls
description: A unique cascading succulent resembling green beaded necklaces.

name: Majesty Palm
description: A classic tropical palm that loves bright light and moist soil.

name: Lemon Button Fern
description: Compact fern with cute round leaves that emit a faint lemony scent.

name: Anthurium
description: Features shiny heart-shaped red spathes that bloom year-round.

name: Flaming Katy
description: A colorful flowering succulent available in brilliant warm shades.

name: Swiss Cheese Vine
description: The climbing cousin of Monstera, perfect for moss poles.

name: Neanthe Bella Palm
description: Also known as Parlor Palm, thrives in tight spaces and low light.

name: Echeveria Rosette
description: Stunning rose-shaped blue-green succulent that loves direct sun.

name: Croton Petra
description: Boasts dramatic autumn-colored leaves with bold yellow veins.

name: Maidenhair Fern
description: Features delicate, lacy fronds. Demands consistent moisture.

name: Maranta Prayer Plant
description: Leaves fold up like praying hands at night. Beautiful red veins.
